obligations.name: Reproduce the defect
obligations.description: Run tests/test_sentiment_pct_sum.py against the base commit and confirm it exits non-zero with at least the Section 1 and Section 2 assertions failing.
evidence_requirements: test output showing FAIL for pct-sum assertions before fix

obligations.name: Identify affected file and symbol
obligations.description: Confirm the defect is in api/services/sentiment_aggregator.py, method compute_market_sentiment(), specifically the three independent round() calls for bullish_pct, bearish_pct, neutral_pct.
evidence_requirements: file path and line numbers cited

obligations.name: Implement minimal fix
obligations.description: Derive neutral_pct as 100.0 - bullish_pct - bearish_pct (after the other two are independently rounded) so the three values always sum to exactly 100.0. Change must touch only api/services/sentiment_aggregator.py.
evidence_requirements: git diff showing only sentiment_aggregator.py changed

obligations.name: Run targeted verification
obligations.description: Run tests/test_sentiment_pct_sum.py after the fix and confirm all 5 assertions pass and the process exits 0.

obligations.name: Prove no unrelated files changed
obligations.description: Confirm git diff shows only api/services/sentiment_aggregator.py was modified. No test files, no other source files.
evidence_requirements: git diff output listing only sentiment_aggregator.py

obligations.name: Document unresolved risk or test gap
obligations.description: State any remaining risk: e.g. floating-point edge cases for very large or very small counts, or cases where bullish+bearish already sum to >100 due to future bugs.
